title: Why was the Lance in Antarctica
display_title: Why was the Lance in Antarctica
wikitext:
[]: Why was the Lance in Antarctica?             Quote Post by aranami » Fri Nov 19, 2004 7:13 pm Why was the lance in Antarctica??? Did the Katsuragi expidition take it down with them and do somthing simalar to what NERV did to Lilith?

[]:             Quote Post by Phaze » Fri Nov 19, 2004 7:47 pm Popular speculation claims the lance was actually Adam's S2 organ. The lance was later on recovered in episode 12, and inserted into Lilith.

[]:             Quote Post by Nephilim » Fri Nov 19, 2004 9:11 pm I don't think that it's adam's s2 organ. Because adam was found with the lance shoved in his chest the same way that nerv then inserted the lance in lilith. I really think about the E2 game axplination. That some ancient civilization created the lance to keep adam sleeped, so humanity could be the rulers of the earth and not the angels.

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Fri Nov 19, 2004 10:26 pm The "Lance = Adam's S^2" theory, which was concocted largely by Sharp-kun over on AN, has been demolished by the "secret" info provided in the new EVA2 game. (Sharp himself immediately conceded as much once the EVA2 revelations were publicized.) The Lance of Longinus was discovered in Antartica within the the White Moon; Adam was impaled upon it, with the tines protruding from his back . (As for how it got there, or who put it there, your guess is as good as mine...) Prior to Second Impact, the Katsuragi Expedition extracted the Lance, and sent it to the Dead Sea, for what purpose is not stated, tho it is possible that somehow it was modified, and then it was returned to Antartica, whereupon Adam was poked with it during the "Contact Experiment" that ended up triggering 2I. The EVA2 game states, among other things, that the Lance serves as a "fail-safe" device, to in some way allow for the process of Complemetation of Life to be controled, which may explain how Shinji, once EVA-01 merges with the Lance, is given "God-like" control over the fate of humanity in #26'...

[]:             Quote Post by Phaze » Fri Nov 19, 2004 10:40 pm Apparently I'm a little rusty on my knowledge, haven't seen Eva in at least half a year.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Nov 21, 2004 1:15 am Shin-seiki wrote: As for how it got there, or who put it there, your guess is as good as mine...

[]:             Quote Post by The Frenchman » Fri Dec 17, 2004 10:38 pm Shin-seiki wrote: Theory has been demolished by the "secret" info provided in the new EVA2 game.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Dec 18, 2004 12:40 am The Frenchman wrote: I am wondering if we hold a real proof that informations revealed in EVA2 Game have been given by Hideaki Anno himself. I said "Hideaki Anno", not "Gainax".

[]:             Quote Post by The Frenchman » Sat Dec 18, 2004 6:55 am Reichu wrote: Anno worked on the game... yes.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Dec 18, 2004 8:19 am The Frenchman wrote: Thank you but where is the proof ? :P Does it exist ?

[]:             Quote Post by The Frenchman » Sat Dec 18, 2004 2:36 pm Reichu wrote: That Anno worked on the game ?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Dec 18, 2004 3:26 pm It was common knowledge, as far as I knew. But since you're being so fastidious, I believe there is something about it in one of the issues of Newtype back at home...

[]:             Quote Post by Tsukasa » Mon Dec 20, 2004 5:51 pm I am wondering if we hold a real proof that informations revealed in EVA2 Game have been given by Hideaki Anno himself. I said "Hideaki Anno", not "Gainax".

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Dec 20, 2004 7:10 pm For my part, I always thought the "Adam and Lilith as one entity" theory was kind of fishy. Although I can't remember my exact objections to it offhand. As far as where Lilith comes from, I said some basic things here: http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php ... abet#11114 If you're interested in pursuing her legend further, one could always start with this Google search . The Legends of the Jews (a rather well-regarded piece of work, from what I know) is a very interesting read, as well (well... the Genesis part, anyway). And a couple of pages I bookmarked a while back: http://www.holysmoke.org/sdhok/lilith.htm http://www.acs.ucalgary.ca/~elsegal/Sho ... ilith.html I'll scan the article I have on NGE2 from Newtype later for anyone interested. Granted, I don't think it ever really outright gives you the "proof" that you want. But NGE info is so meager, if they give us an answer that doesn't contradict with anything that we "know", there is no reason to reject it because of acute scrupulousness. Might as well start rejecting things in the show itself because not every centimeter of it was touched by The Divine Hand of Anno.

[]:             Quote Post by Tsukasa » Mon Dec 20, 2004 7:26 pm Thanks for the links. I'll have to read them later as I am about to go and watch Death and Rebirth simply because I am able. I love piecing Eva together!
